programme.title: Blue World Ep502: Muck Diving in Florida + Iceland…The World's Clearest Water
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird travels to Iceland to investigate a giant crack in the ground filled with frigid runoff from melting glaciers. It’s rumored to be the clearest water in the world. Next, he heads to sunny Florida, not to dive a coral reef or a spectacular shipwreck, but to dive in shallow, murky water under a busy bridge. This secret spot is home to some of the ocean’s most remarkable, and strange, creatures.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep110: Island of Hawaii
programme.desc: Highlights include The Hawaii Forest Trail, Kahua Ranch, swimming with dolphins, Mauna Kea Beach Hotel, a volcano helicopter tour and Kona Brewfest.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep141
programme.desc: This World of Watersports episode features highlights of the Extreme Sailing Series from Los Cabos, Mexico, the World Kiteboarding Tour stop in Egypt, and the Tiree Windsurfing Classic in Scotland.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Can Patagonia Handle the Fly Rod Crew?
programme.desc: The Flemings pursue trout in Patagonia with their good friends from Argentina Waters.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep107: Sharks at Palau’s Blue Corner + Denver’s High-Altitude Shark Aquarium
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with an amazing array of sharks at Palau’s Blue Corner, shows how sharks adapt in Denver’s High-Altitude Aquarium and takes a Deeper Dive with Spiny Dogfish Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep108
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights the birthplace of the coldwater surf scene, Santa Cruz, California; profiles Aussie big wave champ Ross Clark-Jones; and travels to Newfoundland to kayak among the icebergs. Also featured is kiteboarder Billy Parker; free-surfing with Craig Anderson; the world’s toughest kitesurfing marathon; and “Liquid Lens” profiles adventure photographer Erik Boomer.

programme.title: Airtime Ep12: Kiteboarding The British Virgin Islands
programme.desc: Catch wind of a jet-set journey through the British Virgin Islands with British Virgin billionaire, Richard Branson and kiteboarding royalty Martin Vari and Ceridwen Jones. Highlights include a fourteen-mile kiteboarding regatta, magnificent scenery and epic freeriding.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep307: Cliff Diving, Kitefoiling and Waterski Jumping
programme.desc: This WOW episode features Red Bull Cliff Diving in an underground lake in Romania's famous Turda salt mine; the European Kitefoil Championships in Spain; and the Moomba Masters men’s and women’s waterski jumping in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Stay Tuned
programme.desc: ‘Stay Tuned’ is a snowboard film. It is also a film about the need to stay tuned mentally and physically with the natural world. Featuring Mikkel Bang, Nicolas Müller, John Jackson, Brandon Cocard, Ben Ferguson, Red Gerard, Severin Van Der Meer, Dylan Alito, Judd Henkes, and Hans Mindnich.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Yellow Flickers
programme.desc: Do the lines in the road countdown to a supposed arrival? Or are they added up within us, allowing us to grow?

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Balance
programme.desc: Legendary professional snowboarder David Carrier-Porcheron reflects on Surf, Skate, and Snow culture, taking a closer look at what brings balance and happiness to people’s lives. Join us for this thoughtful and exhilarating ride with DCP.

programme.title: Perspektiv
programme.desc: David Carrier-Porcheron is a titan in the snowboarding community. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, DCP and family were left stranded in Costa Rica. Perspektiv tells the story of his return to snow after 13 months. Watch as he rediscovers his love of snowboarding, and why he can’t live without it.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Heroes Healers
programme.desc: This week Ride exercises military precision with the mounts of the Household Cavalry at the British Army’s London Barracks, and sees second chances given to troubled residents at Achterhoek horse shelter in the Netherlands. We’re in the back seat with Polish driving expert Piotr Mazurek and catch up with this year’s Longines FEI Rising Star Award winner, Germany’s Greta Busacker.

programme.desc: Transform your screen into an incredible Vancouver Aquarium experience! Enjoy the beauty and diversity of underwater life, with soothing music and the gentle movement of seaweed, creating a calming atmosphere. Marvel at the vibrant fish and marine creatures.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In 2015 Audi presented a facelift for their city racer A1. We put this compact to the test. Also: it's a tough competition in the compact class, and Renault and Peugeot also want a piece of the pie. We compared the Renault Twingo and the Peugeot 108.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Over the decades compact and city cars have become more and more popular, especially in urban areas. We took a look at three examples for these modern lifestyle vehicles, the 5-door Mini, the Opel Adam Rocks and the Kia Soul EV.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The Custombike show in Bad Salzuflen, Germany, is one of the leading fairs for exclusive motorcycles in Europe and a hub for news and trends in the motorbike scene. From choppers, to cruisers, street fighters to classic bikes, Harleys to Japanese motorcycles, this show always offers something exciting for every taste and age.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Stunt world champion Chris Pfeiffer test drives the BMW F 800 R and explains why he is rather excited about the performance and handling of this robust and agile roadster. Also: a look behind the scenes of German helmet manufacturer Schuberth Helme's testing and development procedures. And: German actor Jürgen Vogel puts his new Ducati 1198 SP to the test at the Nürburgring.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Functional transporters offer high payload and lots of storage space, and the new Volkswagen Crafter is no exception. How does it fare in comparison to the iconic Mercedes Sprinter? Also: the nearly indestructible and also iconic Unimog by Mercedes.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: When the Big Brother, who ruled the neighborhood, is sent to jail; the turf war starts between two groups. They need to find out who is going to be the next Big Brother to run the... See more »

programme.title: Black Cobra
programme.desc: A lone cop struggles to protect a female photographer from a gang of psychopathic bikers.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman out on the town with friends is saved from the clutches of a serial rapist by an ancient but gorgeous vampire, but at what cost?

programme.title: Exorcism in Utero
programme.desc: Herma finds a powerful ring that possesses her when she tries it on. As her body transforms and mind begins to deteriorate, she must find a way out to save herself and her unborn baby.

programme.title: Sharp Teeth
programme.desc: A nuclear leak mutates the fish in the lake next to the local university. Journalism student, Lola Dent sees this story as an opportunity to make the honor list.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E01 - Alpine Ghosts
programme.desc: Mario takes on the unforgiving alpine mountains of the south island of New Zealand in a fallow deer hunt with his bow, and cooks an impressive venison pie dish.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S01:E02 - Deadly Outback
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia where everything is trying to kill you. It's monsoon season when no one attempts to roam around with salt water crocodiles lurking. Mario links up with a long time friend in search of a wild Buffalo.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E07 - Interstate Travel
programme.desc: To slow the spread of CWD, or chronic wasting disease, Michigan conservation officers work Opening Day to make sure no deer come in from infected states; the Wildlife Disease Lab checks suspect deer.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E08 - Dog and Decoys
programme.desc: Montana wardens use everything from a deer decoy to a K-9 to make sure hunters are following the rules.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S01:E06 - The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe. We are again sending cameras to the edge of the solar system giving us The New insights into the evolution of our worlds.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S01:E07 - The Moons of Olympus
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic. Some are just now being seen at the outer rim of our solar system, all are worthy of much more scrutiny.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E12 - Venice and Northern Ireland
programme.desc: Venice, one of Europe’s most iconic and enchanting cities with its labyrinth of waterways and canals linking one hundred and eighteen separate islands. From Venetians to visitors, it’s the city where everyone oozes style. Then on to Northern Ireland, for a ghostly trail around a haunted hotel and a walk on the road to Winterfel, visiting some of the iconic locations featured HBO’s Games of Thrones series.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E13 - Barbados and Lake Como
programme.desc: Barbados has it all. Home to The Cliff, one of the world’s most famous restaurants where sharks swim in the floodlit bay and entertain diners. Considered by many to be the best of the Caribbean Islands it is home to media moguls and pop princesses alike. Italy’s Lake Como also plays host to a number of famous Hollywood stars and directors who’ve fallen in love with its breath-taking vistas and fabulous cuisine.

programme.title: Black Panther – The Story of Emilie and Jacob
programme.desc: Siblings Emilie and Jacob cannot help feeling a deep love for each other. After being apart for many years, they meet in the mountains.

programme.title: Clumsy Little Acts of Tenderness
programme.desc: The Finnish short comedy by Miia Tervo portrays an anything but typical relationship between a loving father and his skeptical daughter.

programme.title: Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three successful blind artists whose visual impairment has become the starting point for their visual explorations.

programme.title: Schmitke
programme.desc: What should have been a ordinary job in the Czech Ore Mountains, becomes a mysterious expedition for the aging engineer Julius Schmitke.

programme.title: Brother

Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond

The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs

programme.title: Elevation Church Live

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you’re starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He’s near, and He won’t let you go down. Don’t panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: Win Before You Begin
programme.desc: Winning starts long before the battle does. When your thoughts are grounded in God’s truth, fear loses its hold and peace takes its place. You walk in victory when you let God’s Word shape how you see your situation.

programme.desc: Camila receives a note from El Doliente who advises her not to keep looking for her mother. This worries her and so she tells Max. She also asks him to trust her, but he is tired of her rudeness. They all suspect that it was Ezequiel who killed Marcos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Esperanza knows about Rosa Blanco. Gregorio and Julia, pretend to the family, but continue to meet. The Aragóns are always at war over the death of Marcos.

programme.title: Abigail - S01:E013 - Episode 13
programme.desc: Estrella and Guillermo argue about Abigail, and he forbids her from approaching her. Abigail seeks revenge on Carlos Alfredo by leaving an anonymous note at the address indicating he has behaved inappropriately with her. Carlos is fired from the school.

programme.title: Abigail - S01:E014 - Episode 14
programme.desc: Estrella believes Abigail is in danger. The Mother Superior confirms to Abigail that Professor Ruiz will not be fired. Guillermo sees María Clara as the ideal stepmother for Abigail. Prof. Godard surprises Charito and Abigail arriving at night.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Claudio receives a call from Pedro warning him to get ready, because Guillermo has been arrested and there is always the possibility that he will end up confessing. Alfonso and Malena are not willing to play Pablo's game. Alberto and Guillermo face to face again, they look at each other with hatred, each one with his own reasons; the whole truth seems to be about to be discovered.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Patricia is not intimidated by Gertrudis, she is ready to make Pablo pay for the physical and psychological violence he exerts on his wife; the lady threatens him fiercely to abandon Malena's defense, while Pablo shows himself triumphant - Guillermo is taken to his cell, when one of the inmates hands him a note with his death sentence: "the fish dies by the mouth".

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Bernice agrees to take Tirso to a man that Pastora assures her will turn her beloved into a gentleman.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila miente sobre su relación con Roberto. Max está muy golpeado y esta situación la aprovecha Astrid que se le insinúa mucho, pero él la rechaza. Ezequiel humillando y maltratando a Leandro, su hijo enfermo.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila dice toda la verdad a Max y confiesa que lo ama, sin embargo, en un nuevo encuentro le pide que confíe en ella mientras trata de resolver el asunto que tanto los atormenta. Roberto, está decidido a matar a Max.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto le pide a Astrid que le consiga un trabajo en Mascarada a cambio de no hacer nada contra Max. Camila confiesa a Max que Roberto la chantajea. Luciano y el inspector interrogan a la Madre Isabel y al Padre Tiziano sobre Rosa Blanco y ellos mienten.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel defiende a Camila de la acusación de Roberto y confronta a Camila. Max, al encontrarla muy triste, le pide que confíe en él. Julia y Gregorio con un plan para que sus padres piensen que no volverán a verse y dejen de seguirlos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila se defiende fieramente de la agresión de Roberto y le cuenta a Max lo sucedido. La Madre Isabel, para ayudar a Camila, le confía a Ezequiel el motivo por el que Roberto la extorsiona. Max presiona a Camila para que le cuente toda la verdad.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto confiesa que fue él quien asesinó a Gabriel para inculpar a Camila. Camila, llora de alegría, al saberse inocente de esa muerte. Max le reitera su incondicional apoyo ratificándole su gran amor. Ezequiel expresa su intención de casarse con Camila

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo
programme.desc: La atracción se desata entre un hombre y una mujer que se conocen en una galería de arte. Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: El Ultimo Verano
programme.desc: Carlos es un Profesor de universidad a punto de jubilarse, pero su futuro se ve en peligro porque una de sus alumnas lo acusa de haber sido acosada. Esto es solo el inicio de la peor racha de su vida ya que Carlos descubre que su esposa lo engaña y que la vida que el creía perfecta se esfuma poco a poco de sus manos... tal vez sea el ultimo verano en la vida de Carlos

programme.title: Como El Gato y El Ratón
programme.desc: El barrio de La Estrella es uno de los más pobres de Bogotá. Allí habitan ciudadanos que han sido desplazados por la guerra y la violencia. Un día y tras años de espera, la luz eléctrica llega al barrio. La gente lo celebra y, pese a oponerse el edil, deciden usarla de manera ilegal. Todo se complicará cuando dos familias tengan un conflicto por unos cables cruzados.

programme.title: Dos Abrazos
programme.desc: Cuatro personas que se ven forzadas a defenderse ante la vida, un ensimismado chico de doce años, la cajera que tiene un encuentro con él, un airado conductor de taxi y la enajenada hija de uno de sus pasajeros, se reúnen en dos abrazos.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
